templates.title: Get Image Dimensions — width, height, format
templates.description: Baca metadata gambar (width, height, format) dari header file. Support PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, WebP. Tanpa library eksternal.

templates.title: Validate Image File Header
templates.description: Cek magic bytes untuk validasi jenis gambar: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, BMP, TIFF.
templates.code:
MAGIC_BYTES = [
    (b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n', 'PNG'),
    (b'\xff\xd8\xff', 'JPEG'),
    (b'GIF87a', 'GIF'),
    (b'GIF89a', 'GIF'),
    (b'BM', 'BMP'),
    (b'RIFF', 'WebP'),
    (b'II\x2a\x00', 'TIFF'),
    (b'MM\x00\x2a', 'TIFF'),
]


def {{nama_fungsi_type}}(filepath):
    """Detect image type from file magic bytes.
    Returns format string ('PNG', 'JPEG', etc.) or None if not recognized.
    """
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        header = f.read(12)
    if len(header) < 2:
        return None
    # WebP special check
    if header[:4] == b'RIFF' and len(header) >= 12 and header[8:12] == b'WEBP':
        return 'WebP'
    for magic, fmt in MAGIC_BYTES:
        if header[:len(magic)] == magic:
            if fmt == 'WebP':
                continue  # handled above
            return fmt
    return None


def {{nama_fungsi}}(filepath, expected_format=None):
    """Validate that a file is a valid image.
    If expected_format is given, checks that the image matches that type.
    Returns True if valid (and matches expected format if given).
    """
    fmt = {{nama_fungsi_type}}(filepath)
    if fmt is None:
        return False
    if expected_format:
        return fmt.lower() == expected_format.lower()
    return True

templates.title: Image → Base64 Data URI
templates.description: Encode gambar ke base64 data URI (untuk embedding di HTML/CSS/JSON). Auto-detect format.
templates.code: MIME_MAP = { 'PNG': 'image/png', 'JPEG': 'image/jpeg', 'GIF': 'image/gif', 'WebP': 'image/webp', 'BMP': 'image/bmp', 'TIFF': 'image/tiff', } def {{nama_fungsi}}(filepath, mime_type=None): """Convert image file to base64 data URI string. Auto-detects MIME type from file header. Usage: """ with open(filepath, 'rb') as f: data = f.read() if mime_type is None: ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower().lstrip('.') mime_type = 'image/' + ext if ext else 'application/octet-stream' encoded = base64.b64encode(data).decode('ascii') return 'data:' + mime_type + ';base64,' + encoded def {{nama_fungsi_decode}}(data_uri, output_path): """Decode base64 data URI and save as image file. Returns file size in bytes. """ if ',' in data_uri: data_uri = data_uri.split(',', 1)[1] data = base64.b64decode(data_uri) with open(output_path, 'wb') as f: f.write(data) return len(data)
